name: bymax-pr
description: Autonomously shepherds an open PR to merge-readiness on ANY project, powered by the `gh` CLI. /bymax-pr:babysit-pr resolves merge conflicts, polls CI every 270s, classifies failures as real vs flaky (re-running flaky checks), fixes real failures locally before pushing, triages bot review comments (4-tier), and notifies you when the PR is green. Never merges, never pushes to the base branch. A built-in preflight verifies the gh CLI is installed and authenticated. Depends on `gh` + `git` but never bundles them.
